• A 2D multiplayer mining game with procedurally generated worlds
  • Features real-time multiplayer via MQTT, inventory management, and upgrade systems
  • Supports both desktop and mobile controls with touch-optimized interface
  • Includes save/load functionality with cloud sync capabilities
  • Contains admin tools for server management and player moderation
    const TILE_TYPES = { EMPTY: 0, DIRT: 1, COAL: 6, IRON: 7, GOLD: 8, DIAMOND: 9, ... };
    class GameEngine { update() { /* physics, movement, mining logic */ } draw() { /* render tiles, players, UI */ } };

This web-based mining game combines real-time multiplayer networking with procedural world generation. Players can mine resources, upgrade equipment, and trade with others while managing fuel and heat levels. The game features a comprehensive save system, cloud synchronization, and both desktop and mobile control schemes.
